summary: Comprehensive testing of MYLokal mobile app - all backend APIs and frontend UI features verified successfully
seed_data_creation: No additional seed data created. Existing seed data in backend/server.py is sufficient and working correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working correctly. Backend APIs return proper data. Frontend renders all screens correctly with proper navigation. No issues found.

tests: API root endpoint returns MYLokal message
GET /api/categories returns 6 categories (FOOD&BEVERAGE, HALAL, OUTDOOR ACTIVITY, SHOPPING MALL, TRAVEL, ALL SERVICE)
GET /api/banners returns banners with welcome, slide, featured types
GET /api/listings/{id} returns single listing (Alila Bangsar Hotel)
GET /api/search?q= returns empty array for empty query

home_tab.welcome_banner: PASS - 'WELCOME TO MYLokal' displayed with colorful logo
home_tab.jalan_jalan_banner: PASS - 'Jalan jalan Cari Makan' banner visible
home_tab.alila_bangsar_hotel_banner: PASS - Hotel banner displayed with image
home_tab.featured_listings: PASS - Featured section with listing cards displayed

category_tab.categories_count: PASS - All 6 categories displayed with images

news_tab.news_list: PASS - News articles displayed with images and dates

notification_tab.notification_list: PASS - Notifications displayed (Selamat Datang, Promosi Istimewa, etc.)

profile_tab.profile_header: PASS - Guest User profile header visible

bottom_tabs.all_5_tabs_visible: PASS - Category, News, Home, Notification, MYProfile
bottom_tabs.tab_navigation: PASS - All tabs clickable and navigate correctly

header.search_icon: PASS - Search icon visible and clickable

navigation.search_screen: PASS - Search screen accessible from header icon
navigation.category_detail: Not tested in this iteration (requires category click)
